description:
The SeisComP system currently has the 2024 M7.5 Noto Peninsula earthquake loaded. A colleague from JMA has sent you the parameters for a significant aftershock that needs to be registered in your local SeisComP system (environment at /home/ga/seiscomp, database mysql://sysop:sysop@localhost/seiscomp, messaging server scmaster on localhost). Register the aftershock with these parameters: Origin time 2024-01-01 16:18:47.00, Latitude 37.29, Longitude 136.78, and Depth 12.0 km. Create a report file at /home/ga/aftershock_report.txt with exactly 5 lines containing the following data as stored in the database:
Line 1: The public ID of the newly created origin
Line 2: The latitude value
Line 3: The longitude value
Line 4: The depth value in km
Line 5: The origin time
